title: imagebuilder: fix detection of referenced stage roots
body: Fix detection of when we need to have an up-to-date copy of a stage's root filesystem for later stages.  ADD and COPY instructions aren't the first lines in their stages, so we can't stop parsing a stage's lines after its first line.  This should fix #1782.
